code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    # skip whitespace
    mut b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      -1
    end
    while i < n and (b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13)
      i = i + 1
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        -1
      end
    end
    if i >= n
      i = n
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut value = 0
      mut has_digit = false
      mut cb = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        -1
      end
      while i < n and cb >= 48 and cb <= 57
        value = value * 10 + (cb - 48)
        has_digit = true
        i = i + 1
        cb = match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          -1
        end
      end
      if has_digit
        product = product * sign * value
      end
    end
  end

  println("product=#{product}")
end
